selftext:
🚀 STOP SCROLLING! The AI Upgrade You Didn't Know You Needed is GONE IN 7 DAYS. (Comet Browser + Perplexity Pro Free – Don't Miss Out!)

Hey Redditors, listen up, because I almost kept this to myself, and you'd be kicking yourself if you missed it.

For months, I've been hopping between browsers, trying to find one that **truly integrates AI** into my workflow without a million annoying steps. I use **Perplexity Pro** daily for deep research, coding help, and summarizing long articles. It's a game-changer.

# The Problem Solver: Comet Browser

I recently switched to **Comet Browser**, and they've done something *genius*. They've partnered with Perplexity to give users a **ridiculously smooth, integrated AI experience**.

* **⚡️ Instant Access:** Literally a keyboard shortcut away, no new tabs, no copy-pasting. Highlight text on *any page* and get a Perplexity summary, rewrite, or deep dive *instantly*.
* **🤯 FREE ACCESS:** For a **limited time**, Comet is running an exclusive promo giving new users a **free Perplexity Pro** just for signing up through this [special link.](https://pplx.ai/marasli)

# Why You Need to Jump on This (Seriously, Check the Timer)

This isn't just another tech gimmick. This is having a lightning-fast, highly contextual AI researcher built directly into the tool you use most. It changes how you consume information.

**THE CATCH:** This exclusive free taccess (verify the exact offer) is only available for a [**LIMITED TIME and LIMITED SLOTS**](https://pplx.ai/marasli)  through this special partnership link before they pull the plug on the new user offer. If you've been waiting to try Perplexity Pro, this is a zero-risk way to experience the best AI search tool available, powered seamlessly by a top-tier browser.

# How to Get Started & Claim Your Free Pro Access:

1. **Click this link IMMEDIATELY:** [`https://pplx.ai/marasli`](https://pplx.ai/marasli)
2. Sign up for the Comet browser and follow the simple steps to activate the Perplexity integration.
3. Start browsing and researching like it's 2030.

Don't be the person who hears about this *next month* and realizes they missed a free premium AI tool. **The clock is ticking!**

Let me know if you have any questions below—happy to help anyone get set up!
